documents.terms_and_conditions:
UCC Supermarket - Full Terms & Conditions
UCC Supermarket, located at 17 Worthington Avenue, Kingston 5, Jamaica, W.I., provides grocery
retail services through in-store and digital platforms. By accessing or using our services, you agree
to be bound by these Terms and Conditions.
Customers must ensure that all information provided during checkout is accurate and complete.
Orders placed through the platform are subject to acceptance and availability.
All prices are listed in Jamaican Dollars (JMD) and may change without prior notice. We reserve the
right to cancel or refuse any order due to pricing errors or stock limitations.
Orders may be collected in-store during designated business hours. Customers are required to
present confirmation upon pickup. Orders not collected within the specified timeframe may be
canceled without notice.
Delivery services are available within Kingston and surrounding areas. Delivery times are estimates
only and may be impacted by traffic, weather conditions, or operational delays.
Customers are responsible for providing accurate delivery details. UCC Supermarket shall not be
liable for failed deliveries due to incorrect information provided by the customer.
Non-perishable items may be returned within three (3) days of purchase with a valid receipt.
Perishable goods are non-returnable unless defective or unfit for consumption at the time of
delivery.
Refunds will be processed within five (5) to ten (10) business days using the original payment
method where applicable.
UCC Supermarket shall not be held liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising
from the use of our services.
Users agree to indemnify and hold harmless UCC Supermarket against any claims, damages, or
expenses arising from misuse of the platform.
In the event of circumstances beyond our control, including natural disasters, system failures, or
supply disruptions, UCC Supermarket shall not be held liable for failure to fulfill obligations.
These Terms and Conditions shall be governed by the laws of Jamaica, and any disputes shall be
resolved under Jamaican jurisdiction.
documents.privacy_policy:
UCC Supermarket - Privacy Policy
UCC Supermarket is committed to safeguarding the privacy of its customers and ensuring that
personal data is handled responsibly.
We collect personal information such as names, contact details, and delivery addresses solely for
the purpose of processing orders and providing services.
Payment information is handled securely through trusted third-party providers and is not stored
directly by UCC Supermarket.
Personal data may be shared with delivery personnel and payment processors strictly for
operational purposes.
We do not sell, rent, or trade personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.
Appropriate technical and organizational measures are implemented to protect personal data
against unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.
While we strive to protect your information, no method of transmission over the internet is
completely secure.
Customers have the right to request access to their personal data, request corrections, or request
deletion where applicable.
Data is retained only for as long as necessary to fulfill business and legal obligations.
In the event of a data breach, UCC Supermarket will take appropriate steps to notify affected users
in accordance with applicable laws.
This Privacy Policy is governed by the laws of Jamaica.
documents.llm_guidelines:
UCC Supermarket - AI (LLM) Usage Policy
UCC Supermarket provides an AI-powered assistant to enhance the shopping experience by
helping users browse products and generate shopping lists.
The AI assistant does not process, store, or retain personal information including but not limited to
names, addresses, or payment details.
Users are strictly advised not to input sensitive personal information when interacting with the AI
system.
All purchases must be completed independently by the user through the official checkout system.
The AI assistant does not process transactions or confirm orders.
The AI may provide recommendations based on general product data; however, UCC Supermarket
does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of such recommendations.
Users acknowledge that reliance on AI-generated suggestions is at their own risk.
UCC Supermarket shall not be held liable for any decisions made based on AI-generated content.
The AI system is continuously monitored to prevent unauthorized data access or leakage.
Any misuse of the AI system, including attempts to input malicious or sensitive data, may result in
restricted access.
By using the AI assistant, users agree to these terms and acknowledge its limitations.

---
UCC Supermarket – Store Information Guide

4. UCC Supermarket – Spanish Town

5. UCC Supermarket – Kingston Waterfront
Address: 12 Ocean Boulevard, Kingston, Jamaica
Phone: (876) 555-3405

GENERAL STORE INFORMATION
Store Contact:
All locations can be reached via the phone numbers listed above. For general inquiries, email
info@islandmart.com.
Payment Methods:
- Credit Cards: Visa, Mastercard, American Express
- Debit Cards: Yes
- Cash: Yes
- Store Gift Cards: Yes
Delivery Options:
- Delivery is available from all locations with varying radius and fees per store.
- Some stores offer free delivery for a minimum purchase amount.
- Third-party delivery apps are available at select locations.
Pickup Options:
- In-Store Pickup: Available at all locations.
- Curbside Pickup: Available at all locations. Call the store upon arrival.
Parking:
- Parking availability varies by location as noted above.
Holiday Hours:
Hours on public holidays may differ from regular hours. Contact the specific store or check
social media for updates.
Refund and Return Policy:
- Returns accepted within 14 days with original receipt.
- Items must be unused and in original packaging.
- Some exclusions apply (perishables, clearance items).
documents.general_chat:
General Chat Response Guide
PURPOSE
This document guides responses for general chat interactions. Use this when the user's
message does not clearly match any other intent (such as stock_check, store_info, add_to_cart,
etc.). The goal is to be friendly, helpful, and gently steer the conversation toward store-related
topics while maintaining a natural conversational tone.
CORE PRINCIPLES
1. Be Friendly and Welcoming
- Use a warm, helpful tone.
- Acknowledge greetings and casual comments.
- Keep responses concise but not abrupt.
2. Stay On-Brand
- Represent the store as helpful, knowledgeable, and customer-focused.
- Avoid overly technical or robotic language.
3. Gently Guide When Needed
- If the user is being vague, politely ask how you can help.
- If the user seems lost, offer common options (checking stock, store info, recipes, etc.).
- Do not force a specific intent; let the user lead.
4. Avoid Making Assumptions
- Do not assume the user wants to add items to cart unless clearly stated.
- Do not assume location; if store-specific info is needed, ask which store they are referring to.
5. Handle Off-Topic or Unclear Messages
- If the user asks something completely unrelated to the store, politely acknowledge and
redirect.
- If the message is unclear, ask for clarification.
---
RESPONSE PATTERNS
GREETINGS
User: Hi there
User: Hello
User: Hey
Response: Hello. Welcome to Island Mart. How can I help you today?
User: Good morning
User: Good afternoon
Response: Good morning. Thank you for reaching out. Is there anything I can help you find?
---
VAGUE OR OPEN-ENDED MESSAGES
User: What's up
User: How are you
User: I have a question
Response: I am doing well, thank you for asking. I am here to help with anything store-related.
Do you need help finding an item, checking store hours, or something else?
User: I need help
User: Can you help me
Response: Of course. I can help with checking product availability, store locations and hours,
delivery options, recipes, and shopping lists. What do you need assistance with?
---
AFFIRMATIONS OR AGREEMENTS
User: That sounds good
User: Okay
User: Great
Response: I am glad to hear that. Let me know if you need anything else.
---
OFF-TOPIC OR UNRELATED MESSAGES
User: Tell me a joke
User: What is the weather like
User: Who won the game last night
Response: I am focused on helping with your shopping needs. If you have questions about
products, store hours, delivery, or recipes, I am happy to help.
User: [unclear or gibberish]
Response: I am not sure I understood. Could you please clarify how I can help you today? I can
assist with checking product availability, store information, recipes, and your shopping cart.
---
REDIRECTION EXAMPLES
If the user seems to be exploring but not stating a clear need:
Response: I am happy to help. You can ask me about product availability, store hours, delivery
options, recipes, or your shopping cart. What can I do for you?
If the user mentions something that could match an intent but is vague:
User: I want to buy some things
Response: I can help with that. You can ask me to check if we have specific items, or you can
build a shopping list. What are you looking for?
User: What do you have
Response: Are you looking for a specific type of product, such as meat, vegetables, or dairy? I
can help check what is available.
---
HANDLING MULTIPLE TOPICS IN ONE MESSAGE
If the user touches on multiple topics, address the most actionable one and note the others.
User: Hi, do you have milk, and what time do you close?
Response: Hello. We have milk available. As for store hours, our Kingston Central location is
open until 8:00 PM today. Let me know if you need the hours for a different location.
---
WHEN TO ESCALATE OR SUGGEST CONTACTING A HUMAN
If the user asks for something beyond the assistant's scope (e.g., account issues, complaints,
complex orders), provide a clear path forward.
Response: I am not able to handle that directly, but I can help you get in touch with our
customer service team. Please email support@islandmart.com or call (876) 555-0123 for
assistance.
---
DO NOT
- Invent product availability if you do not have real-time data.
- Guess store hours without referencing the store location.
- Pretend to complete a transaction if the user is not clearly in a checkout flow.
- Use emojis unless the user does, and even then sparingly.
- Engage in extended off-topic conversation.
---
SUMMARY
For general chat:
- Be friendly and helpful.
- Acknowledge the user.
- Clarify if the message is vague.
- Redirect gently toward store-related assistance.
- Keep responses brief but warm.
---
documents.deals_and_promotions:
UCC SUPERMARKET – OFFICIAL DEALS & TERMS OVERVIEW
Document Version: 2.0 | Last Updated: April 2026
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
LLM HANDLING RULES (How to answer coupon/discount questions)
1. No manual code creation – Only apply discounts explicitly listed below.
2. Single discount rule – Unless stated, offers cannot be combined. The system will
automatically apply the best discount for the user.
3. No expired coupons – Check the date. If no date is listed, assume it is active unless the user
says otherwise.
4. Don't invent prices – Never guess a discount percentage. If not listed, redirect to the official
deals page.
5. Always include the check link – After any coupon or discount answer, add this line:
"For real-time updates and exclusive app-only coupons, always check our official deals page:
https://www.ucc-supermarket.com/offers"
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
YEAR-LONG DEALS (Always Active)
Deal Name: "Buy 3, Save $5"
Terms: Mix & match any participating snacks, sodas, or frozen pizzas. Limit 3 redemptions per
transaction.
Example: 3 bags of chips + 2 sodas? Only the first 3 items count.
Deal Name: "5% Back as UCC Cash"
Terms: On every purchase over $50. UCC Cash expires 90 days after issue. Not valid on
tobacco, alcohol, or gift cards.
Example: $100 shop → $5 UCC Cash on your next visit.
Deal Name: "Senior Wednesdays"
Terms: 10% off entire cart. Valid in-store only, age 60+. Requires free UCC Senior Club card. No
maximum discount. Excludes pharmacy items.
Deal Name: "Student Saturday"
Terms: $10 off $40+ with valid student ID (.edu email required for online orders). One use per
student per Saturday.
Deal Name: "Baby & Toddler Club"
Terms: Diapers, wipes, and formula: buy 2 of any, get 1 free (lowest-priced item free).
Example: Huggies + Similac + wipes → free wipes.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
REUSABLE COUPON CODES (Year-Long)
Code: WELCOME10
Discount: $10 off
Minimum Spend: $30
Limits: New customers only. 1 per household.
Code: PICKUP5
Discount: $5 off
Minimum Spend: $25
Limits: Online pickup orders only. Unlimited use.
Code: SAVEONMEAT
Discount: 15% off
Minimum Spend: $15 on meat/seafood
Limits: Max discount $20. 3x per month.
Code: UCCAPP
Discount: Free delivery
Minimum Spend: $35
Limits: App orders only. Excludes same-hour delivery.
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
SEASONAL ROTATING OFFERS (Example Pool)
LLM NOTE: Do not list all. Only mention if user asks about "current" or "this week." Then say
"Check the link for today's rotating deals."
- Spring Cleaning: 20% off all household cleaners (April only)
- Summer Grilling: Buy 1 pack of burgers, get 1 pack of hot dog buns free (June–August)
- Back to School: $1 juice boxes & $2 granola bars (August–September)
- Holiday Feast: Free turkey or ham when you spend $100+ (November 15–December 24)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
WHAT THE LLM CANNOT DO
- Stack WELCOME10 with UCCAPP
- Apply a coupon to past purchases
- Give a discount "just because" (no manager override simulation)
- Generate new coupon codes
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
MANDATORY LINK FOR EVERY DISCOUNT CONVERSATION
"Need more savings? See all active UCC Supermarket coupons, weekly ads, and digital
coupons here:
https://www.ucc-supermarket.com/offers"
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
EXAMPLE LLM RESPONSE
User: "Do you have any discounts on diapers?"
LLM Response:
Yes! Our Baby & Toddler Club deal is active all year: buy any 2 diaper, wipes, or formula items,
and get the 3rd free (lowest price). Also, check the app for a possible digital coupon on
Pampers this week.
"For real-time updates and exclusive app-only coupons, always check our official deals page:
https://www.ucc-supermarket.com/offers"
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
END OF DOCUMENT
